# Copilot Instructions

Before making any changes to this codebase, read `doc/CONTEXT.md` in full.
It is the canonical reference document for this project and contains:

- Complete file structure and purpose of every file
- All CSS class names, constants, and their exact values
- Design decisions and the reasons behind them
- A full bug history — bugs that were fixed and must not be reintroduced
- State variables, refs, and why each exists
- OBS Browser Source setup and deployment notes

Do not guess at intent or structure — the answers are in that file.
